items.title: Spain finally announce World Cup arrival as Yamal, Oyarzabal star in Saudi win
items.summary: Lamine Yamal and Mikel Oyarzabal were the stars of the show as Spain finally announced their arrival at the 2026 World Cup with a 4-0 thrashing of Saudi Arabia.

items.summary: AJAX have parted company with former Brighton and Watford boss Oscar Garcia. The Dutch giants confirmed that a mutual decision had been reached to terminate Garcia's contract a year early. items.title: 'Just go home, Rory!' | Angry McIlroy vents his frustration at US Open

items.summary: NORWAY centre-back Leo Ostigard has revealed that he watched the birth of his son on FACETIME while in the United States for the World Cup.
